PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?founder ?founderLabel WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P7128 wd:Q820526 ; wdt:P2013 ?revenue ; wdt:P571 ?foundingDate .
  ?revenue wikibase:quantityAmount ?revenueValue .
  ?company wdt:P112 ?founder .
  ?founder wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
  FILTER((YEAR(?foundingDate) - YEAR(?birthDate)) < 30)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?founder rdfs:label ?founderLabel
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?revenueValue)
LIMIT 10
